description_long: This is a standard Coca-Cola can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a vibrant red background and the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its surface. The can is adorned with small water droplets, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The top of the can is silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of beverage cans. Nutritional information, ingredients, and branding details are printed in white on the back side of the can. Subtle yellow and white swooshes add dynamic visual interest to the design. The can's compact size and familiar branding make it instantly recognizable as a popular carbonated soft drink.
description: A red Coca-Cola can with white script logo, water droplets, and a silver pull-tab top. Features branding, nutritional info, and dynamic swoosh graphics.
description_view_0: Partial Coca-Cola logo visible with water droplets and some nutritional text on the left side.
description_view_1: Front-facing view with the largest, most prominent Coca-Cola script and dynamic swoosh graphics.
description_view_2: Side view showing the Coca-Cola logo and more of the swoosh design, with less text visible.
description_view_3: Back view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and smaller Coca-Cola branding.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola logo, white cursive script, located prominently on the front and back of the can, dominant color is white on a red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can's red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the can, including volume (33 cl), energy content, and other details.
